creator: regteston@mail.ru
text:
In installation menu not work PS/2 input device - keyboard and mouse.

Fix: 

Dear developers!

I have a problem to install FreeBSD 9 on computer from CD Boot disk.
This problem issue if to computer not plug PS/2 input device (keyboard
or mouse).
At beginig install in "Start menu" PS/2 keyboard work and allow selection
menu item. But after kernel loading on "Wellcome screen" do not work
PS/2 input device. Work USB input only.

Thank You!

Alexey M.
How-To-Repeat: On FreeBSD 9-RC3 and RELEASE i386.
Sorry what I'am send at last moment, but i not test FreeBSD 9 earlier.
